cases.prompt: 클로드가 접근법 A로 5개 파일 읽고 시도했는데 실패했어. 어떻게 이어가지?

assertions.text: The agent recommends /rewind over continuing, because the failed attempt would otherwise stay in context.
The agent specifies re-injecting only the lesson learned (e.g. 'approach A does not work') after rewinding.
The agent explains that failed attempts left in context get re-read every message (exponential cost).

cases.prompt: Session is getting heavy but the work is going fine, what should I do?

assertions.text: The agent recommends a proactive /compact rather than waiting for auto-compaction at 95%.
The agent produces a focus/exclude hint for the /compact command instead of a bare /compact.

cases.prompt: 다른 레포의 OAuth 흐름을 요약만 받고 싶어. 세션 관리 관점에서 어떻게 해?

assertions.text: The agent applies the question 'will I need the intermediate output again?' and answers no.
The agent recommends delegating to a subagent so the other repo's files never enter the main context.
The agent connects to the agent-delegate skill for the delegation design.
